hooks.command: cd /home/user/AigentZBeta && bash scripts/qubetalk-claude.sh send --thread dev-exec --title "Claude Code session started" --body "Agent session active on $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --severity info 2>/dev/null || true
cd /home/user/AigentZBeta && bash scripts/qubetalk-claude.sh send --thread dev-exec --title "Claude Code session stopped" --body "Agent session ended" --severity info 2>/dev/null || true
